name: stackra-platform/application-sdk
purpose: Wire-visible SDK for the application module of Platform — typed Spatie Data DTOs + Saloon requests + fluent resources for Application + BusinessType, discovered by platform-sdk.
capabilities: Spatie Data response DTOs + request-body Payloads
Saloon Request classes per endpoint (11 total)
when_to_use: Any peer service that needs to resolve an Application by id or slug, or manage the business-type catalogue.
when_not_to_use: In-process Application queries inside the identity service should use the stackra/application module directly.
